# Proactive Accounting & Tax

> Proactive Accounting & Tax is a San Diego–area CPA and tax advisory firm founded by Ryan D. Sims, CPA, EA, MBA — a California-licensed CPA and IRS Enrolled Agent. The firm provides year-round tax planning, tax preparation, coordinated bookkeeping, and business advisory for individuals and small business owners — with an emphasis on proactive, ongoing communication rather than once-a-year tax filing.

Key facts:

- Business name: Proactive Accounting & Tax
- Website: https://proactive-at.com/
- Address: 3605 Ocean Ranch Blvd, Suite 202, Oceanside, CA 92056
- Phone: (760) 205-0625
- Service area: San Diego County, California (Oceanside, San Diego, and surrounding communities)
- Founder: Ryan D. Sims, CPA, EA, MBA — Certified Public Accountant (California), IRS Enrolled Agent, MBA, small business owner, and military veteran
- Tax preparation available for clients in all 50 states
- Ideal clients: small and growing business owners who want one coordinated place for bookkeeping, tax strategy, and year-round planning
- Getting started: free, no-pressure discovery call, requested via the contact form or by phone

## Services

- [Tax Preparation & Compliance](https://proactive-at.com/tax-accounting-services/): individual and business tax returns, federal and state compliance in all 50 states, IRS and state correspondence support
- [Proactive Tax Planning](https://proactive-at.com/tax-accounting-services/): year-round planning to legally reduce tax liability — timing income and expenses, identifying deductions and credits early, planning for growth and major changes
- [Accounting & Bookkeeping](https://proactive-at.com/tax-accounting-services/): bookkeeping performed in-house for select clients or through vetted bookkeeping partners, always coordinated with tax strategy and overseen by the CPA
- [Business Advisory & Entity Structuring](https://proactive-at.com/tax-accounting-services/): LLC vs. S-Corp considerations, business structure changes, owner compensation planning

## Pages

- [Home](https://proactive-at.com/): overview of the firm's proactive approach to tax and accounting for San Diego area small business owners
- [Our Approach](https://proactive-at.com/our-approach/): how the firm coordinates bookkeeping and tax planning into one strategy led by the CPA
- [Tax + Accounting Services](https://proactive-at.com/tax-accounting-services/): full description of all four service areas
- [Meet Ryan Sims](https://proactive-at.com/meet-ryan-sims/): background and credentials — CPA, Enrolled Agent, MBA, former tax advisor, auditor, and bank examiner
- [Contact](https://proactive-at.com/contact/): contact form, office address, phone number, and map
- [Discovery Call](https://proactive-at.com/discovery-call/): how to schedule a free initial consultation

## Affiliations

- Oceanside Chamber of Commerce member
- BNI member
- IRS Enrolled Agent
- QuickBooks Online Advanced Certified ProAdvisor
